questionHtml:
A block of mass 2.0 kg accelerates from a speed of 15 m s−1 to a speed of 20 m s−1 without changing its direction.

What impulse acts on the block?


A.  2.5 N s

B.  5.0 N s

C.  10 N s

D.  17.5 N s

meta.title: A block of mass 2.0 kg accelerates from a speed of 15 m s−1 to a speed of 20 m s−1 without changing its direction. What impulse acts on the block? A. 2.5 N s B. 5.0 N s C. 10 N s D
